---
title: "Paid Resources plaintext"
author: Greg Brooks
date: 03-28-2026
draft: true
categories:
    - Industry Commentary
    - Paid Tools
---

# Professional Orgs

## National Associations
- [Apra](https://www.aprahome.org/)
- [Association of Fundraising Professionals](https://afpglobal.org/)
- [Council for Advancement and Support of Education](https://www.case.org/)

## Regional Associations
- [Apra Utah]([https://www.apra-utah.org/](https://www.google.com/search?q=https://www.apra-utah.org/))

# Conferences
- [Apra Annual Conference](https://www.aprahome.org/apra-annual-conference)
- [AFP ICON](https://afpglobal.org/events/icon)
- [CASE District Conferences](https://www.case.org/events/district-conferences)
- [CASE Summit](https://www.case.org/events/summit)

# Books

# Websites & Blogs
